items.question: Who performs treatments at Lumina?
items.answer: All services are performed or supervised by licensed medical professionals. Your plan begins with a consultation to align goals, safety, and expectations.

items.question: Is there downtime?
items.answer: Many treatments have minimal downtime. Some services may involve temporary redness, swelling, or sensitivity. We’ll provide clear pre- and post-care guidance.

items.question: How do I choose the right treatment?
items.answer: We’ll recommend options based on your goals, anatomy, skin condition, timeline, and comfort level—prioritizing natural-looking outcomes.

items.question: Do you offer pricing before treatment?
items.answer: Yes. You’ll receive a transparent plan and estimate before we begin. We can also stage treatments over time based on your preferences.

items.question: Can I be treated the same day as my consultation?
items.answer: Sometimes. For neuromodulator, same-day treatment may be an option if you’re a good candidate. For filler or more involved treatments, we often recommend a separate visit. The provider will tell you what’s appropriate.

items.question: I have an event in a few weeks. When should I come in?
items.answer: For injectables we recommend at least two weeks before a major event so any bruising or swelling can resolve. For facials or Hydrafacial, a few days to a week before is often ideal. We can help you choose a treatment and date.

items.question: Do you focus on natural-looking results?
items.answer: Yes. We aim for results that look like you—refreshed or refined, not overdone. We use conservative dosing and technique and will tell you when we think less is more for your goals.
